_readme: Declarative safety rules for THIS repo, enforced by the TRUSTED orbit-guard ON TOP of Orbit's built-in wall (force-push, rm -rf / of a root/home/system path, disk wipes, curl|sh, unresolved $VAR commands, …). Rules here can only ADD caution — a rule can raise a command to 'ask' or 'deny', but can NEVER weaken a built-in deny, and 'allow' is not honored. No code, data only: the executable wall lives in the trusted plugin, so this repo can't disable its own protection. Add rules to the 'rules' array below; the '_examples' are shown for shape only and are NOT applied.

_examples.reason: deploys are a human checkpoint here.
the DB schema is frozen — no migrations from the loop.
pushing a protected branch — confirm the target.
